review_notes: A single row can list two people: primary occupant in columns 16-17, second occupant of a twin in columns 18-19. A row therefore yields one or two guests.
Row 1 is a summary line and row 2 is the header, so data begins at row 3 (header_rows = 2).
Rows whose surname column begins with 'Al.Mat' are held capacity ('names pending'), not real guests, and are skipped.
This list carries names and logistics only — no birth date, sex, citizenship, birthplace, or document. Every guest needs those captured before submission.
